landing.badge: Open-source SaaS starter — Next.js + Stripe + Supabase
landing.headline: The SaaS starter kit that lets you <accent>ship faster</accent>
landing.subheadline: Authentication, billing, organizations, and i18n — all wired up. Fork the repo and start building your product in minutes.
landing.trustText: Built with Next.js, Stripe, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS
landing.featuresTitle: Built for teams that care about quality
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to deploy confidently at any scale — without the ops overhead.
landing.featureDeploysDesc: Email and password auth powered by Supabase. Session handling, JWT tokens, and protected routes — ready out of the box.
landing.featureAiDesc: Stripe Checkout, billing portal, and subscription management. Webhooks keep plan status in sync automatically.
landing.featureEdgeDesc: Multi-org support with member invitations and three roles: Owner, Admin, and Member. Scoped data access included.
landing.featureObsDesc: 20 languages out of the box with next-intl. Locale-aware routing, RTL support, and easy-to-edit JSON translation files.
landing.featureSecDesc: Avatar uploads, display names, pronouns, timezone, and preferences. A complete settings page your users will appreciate.
landing.featureIntDesc: Tailwind CSS v4, responsive layouts, atomic design system, and accessible components. Mobile-first and themeable.
landing.ctaSectionSubtitle: Fork the repo, customize the branding, and launch. Free and open-source.
landing.dashActivity1: New user signed up — Pro plan

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.registered: Account created! Check your email to verify your account.
login.accountDeleted: Your account has been deleted. We're sorry to see you go.
login.errorNoSession: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
login.errorEmailNotVerified: Please verify your email address before signing in. Check your inbox for a verification link.
login.errorTokenExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
login.errorBackendRejected: Authentication failed. Please try signing in again.
login.errorOAuth: Social login failed. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.

oauth.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: This is your SaaS template dashboard. Customize it to fit your product.
dashboard.actionBillingDesc: Connect Stripe and configure your pricing plans.
dashboard.actionProfileDesc: Add your avatar, bio, and preferences.
dashboard.actionOrgDesc: Invite your team and start collaborating.
dashboard.actionCustomizeDesc: Edit components, colors, and copy to match your brand.

settings.title: Settings
settings.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself
settings.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all data.
settings.deleteDialogDescription: This action cannot be undone. Type your email address to confirm.
settings.deleteDialogMismatch: Email does not match your account email.
settings.deleteDialogError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Have a question or need help? We'd love to hear from you.

about.title: About this project
about.intro: This is an open-source SaaS starter built with Next.js and Stripe. It gives you authentication, billing, organisations, and i18n out of the box — so you can skip the boilerplate and start building your product.
about.body: Fork it on GitHub, swap in your own branding, and you're ready to go. Whether you're launching a side project or a full-blown SaaS, this template has you covered.
about.repoFrontend: Next.js frontend with auth, billing, and i18n
about.repoBackend: Django backend with Stripe integration and REST API

blog.title: Blog
blog.comingSoon: New posts coming soon. Stay tuned!
